entity.summary: Monad-native automated-market-maker decentralized exchange providing on-chain spot swaps and liquidity pools.
entity.notes: The current first-party application exposes live Monad swap markets, and independent metrics report non-zero recent DEX volume. Activity is small, so confidence remains medium and HEI does not infer broader adoption, a launch date, or a legal jurisdiction.

evidence.title: Purps official exchange application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes the Purps swap interface and Monad markets and remains reachable during review.

evidence.title: PurpsExchange protocol profile and trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent protocol data identifies PurpsExchange as a Monad AMM and reports non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification despite thin activity.
